svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="icGNRPGWwvjntqWPlQph"> <mxGraphModel dx="1687" dy="1327" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="x0AvHDowk0wnR5uFKDbI-46" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;labelBackgroundColor=default;fontColor=light-dark(#000000,#FFFFFF);" value="<pre style="font-family: Consolas, &quot;Courier New&quot;, monospace; font-size: 16px; line-height: 18.9px; margin: 0px; tab-size: 4; white-space: pre-wrap; padding: 8px 0px 10px;"><code>codelens/<br>├── .env # API keys — never commit this<br>├── .gitignore # includes .env, __pycache__, /tmp<br>├── README.md # what it is, how to run, screenshots<br>├── ARCHITECTURE.md # this document<br>├── requirements.txt<br>│<br>├── frontend/<br>│ ├── index.html # Single page: repo input + chat + report viewer<br>│ ├── style.css # Dark theme, terminal-style output<br>│ └── app.js # fetch() calls + WebSocket for indexing progress<br>│<br>└── backend/<br> ├── main.py # FastAPI app, routes, serves frontend as static files<br> ├── graph.py # Assemble all nodes into agent graph<br> │<br> ├── agents/<br> │ ├── __init__.py<br> │ ├── planner.py # LLM node: decides which tools to call next<br> │ └── responder.py # LLM node: generates the final answer<br> │<br> ├── tools/<br> │ ├── __init__.py<br> │ ├── search_tool.py # ChromaDB hybrid search (semantic + BM25)<br> │ ├── file_tool.py # Read specific files from the cloned repo<br> │ └── structure_tool.py # File tree listing, find symbol definitions<br> │<br> ├── indexer/<br> │ ├── __init__.py<br> │ ├── cloner.py # Git clone to /tmp/codelens/repos/{repo_id}<br> │ ├── chunker.py # AST-aware chunking — THE most important file<br> │ └── embedder.py # Embed chunks, store in ChromaDB with metadata<br> │<br> ├── core/<br> │ ├── __init__.py<br> │ ├── config.py # Loads .env via pydantic-settings<br> │ ├── db.py # SQLite: async CRUD for repos table<br> │ └── vector_store.py # ChromaDB wrapper: get/create collection per repo<br> │<br> └── schema/<br> ├── __init__.py<br> ├── state.py # LangGraph AgentState TypedDict<br> └── models.py # Pydantic request/response models for API</code></pre>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="880" width="820" x="-90" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 440px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #FFFFFF); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

pre.style: font-family: Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 16px; line-height: 18.9px; margin: 0px; tab-size: 4; white-space: pre-wrap; padding: 8px 0px 10px;
pre.code:
codelens/
├── .env # API keys — never commit this
├── .gitignore # includes .env, __pycache__, /tmp
├── README.md # what it is, how to run, screenshots
├── ARCHITECTURE.md # this document
├── requirements.txt
│
├── frontend/
│ ├── index.html # Single page: repo input + chat + report viewer
│ ├── style.css # Dark theme, terminal-style output
│ └── app.js # fetch() calls + WebSocket for indexing progress
│
└── backend/
├── main.py # FastAPI app, routes, serves frontend as static files
├── graph.py # Assemble all nodes into agent graph
│
├── agents/
│ ├── __init__.py
│ ├── planner.py # LLM node: decides which tools to call next
│ └── responder.py # LLM node: generates the final answer
│
├── tools/
│ ├── __init__.py
│ ├── search_tool.py # ChromaDB hybrid search (semantic + BM25)
│ ├── file_tool.py # Read specific files from the cloned repo
│ └── structure_tool.py # File tree listing, find symbol definitions
│
├── indexer/
│ ├── __init__.py
│ ├── cloner.py # Git clone to /tmp/codelens/repos/{repo_id}
│ ├── chunker.py # AST-aware chunking — THE most important file
│ └── embedder.py # Embed chunks, store in ChromaDB with metadata
│
├── core/
│ ├── __init__.py
│ ├── config.py # Loads .env via pydantic-settings
│ ├── db.py # SQLite: async CRUD for repos table
│ └── vector_store.py # ChromaDB wrapper: get/create collection per repo
│
└── schema/
├── __init__.py
├── state.py # LangGraph AgentState TypedDict
└── models.py # Pydantic request/response models for API
